get.description: With JWT: returns companies where the user is owner or member. With x-access-token: returns the single company bound to the token.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT or access token

get.description: Retrieves a specific company by its unique identifier with all relations

patch.description: Updates an existing company. Requires company access permissions.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token or insufficient permissions

get.description: Retrieves a list of companies with optional filtering

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by company status (new, trial, active, inactive, churned, paused, banned)

post.description: Creates a new company. The authenticated user becomes the owner.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user from a company

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token

404.description: Company not found or user is not a member

400.description: Invalid email or company not found
Invalid token or invitation already used

post.summary: Accept invitation (works for both logged in users and after signup)
Generate new access token for company

get.summary: Get all access tokens for company

get.description: Retrieves a specific assistant by its unique identifier

patch.description: Updates an existing assistant's configuration. Requires assistant access permissions.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token or insufficient permissions

delete.description: Deletes an assistant and all associated resources. Requires assistant access permissions.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token or insufficient permissions

get.description: Retrieves a list of assistants with optional filtering by name, type, or company

post.description: Creates a new AI assistant with configuration. Requires appropriate permissions.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token

post.description: Moves an assistant from one company to another, recreating all external resources (ElevenLabs, vectors) in the new company while preserving assistant configuration and knowledge.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the assistant to transfer

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: ID of the target company to transfer the assistant to

newAssistantId.description: ID of the newly created assistant in the target company

404.description: Assistant or target company not found

500.description: Transfer failed - assistant remains in original company

post.description: Initiates an outgoing call to a specified phone number using the assistant's configured phone number. The call is processed asynchronously.

requestBody.description: Target phone number and optional caller assistant. `callerAssistantId` must belong to the same company as the route assistant; when omitted, the route assistant is used as the caller.

success.description: Indicates if the workflow was started successfully

workflowId.description: Temporal workflow ID to track call status

400.description: Invalid phone number format or missing required fields

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid JWT token or insufficient permissions

items.description: Chat conversation with display name and messages

get.summary: Get all conversations with optional filtering

schema.description: Chat details with messages or null if not found

get.summary: Get specific chat by ID with messages

delete.description: Deletes a chat conversation and all associated messages

patch.description: Enables or disables AI handling for the chat. When disabling, you may optionally specify `aiDisableReason`; if omitted, it defaults to `manual`.

requestBody.description: AI control state and optional disable reason

message.description: Success message about AI control status

patch.summary: Toggle AI control for chat conversation

post.description: Creates a new message in a chat conversation

400.description: Invalid message data or chat not found

get.description: Returns the most recent message for each of the specified chat IDs

200.description: Last messages retrieved successfully. Returns Record<chatId, IMessage>

get.summary: Get last message for each chat

get.description: Retrieves a specific message by its unique identifier

delete.description: Deletes a message from a chat conversation

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's information based on JWT token

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Generates new access and refresh tokens using a valid refresh token
Creates a new user account with email and password

400.description: Invalid email format or user already exists

post.description: Authenticates user with email and password, returns JWT tokens

info.title: Happ Platform API - Public
info.description:
## Happ Platform API

Connect messenger channels (Telegram, Instagram, WhatsApp) and a voice assistant to your business.

### Authentication

1. Sign in (`POST /api/auth/sign-in`) to get a JWT — or open your account at [my.happ.tools](https://my.happ.tools).
2. Generate an **Access Token**: `POST /api/companies/{companyId}/access-tokens` (JWT required).
3. Send it on every request:
   ```
   X-Access-Token: happ_your_token_here
   ```

An Access Token is scoped to a **single company/team** — it only reaches that company's resources. For example `GET /api/companies` returns just that company, not every company you belong to.

Use the Access Token to integrate. JWT (`Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`) is for the web/admin panel and the bootstrap auth endpoints only.

### Guides & interactive examples

Step-by-step guides, quickstart and live examples: **[docs.happ.tools](https://docs.happ.tools/en/docs/api)**

### Building with an AI assistant

Using Claude, Cursor or Copilot to integrate? Point it at the machine-readable spec — `GET /api/swagger-json` — and the docs index [docs.happ.tools/llms.txt](https://docs.happ.tools/llms.txt). Both are kept in sync with this reference.

jwt-auth.name: JWT Token
jwt-auth.description: Enter JWT token from admin panel

providerId.description: Provider ID for voice assistant integration

textLlmModelId.description: FK to llm_models (type=text) — chat LLM selection

voiceLlmModelId.description: FK to llm_models (type=voice) — voice agent LLM selection

disableFirstMessageInterruption.description: Disable interruption of the first message

turnAfterSilence.description: The maximum number of seconds since the user last spoke. If exceeded, the agent will respond and force a turn. A value of -1 means the agent will wait indefinitely for user input.

silenceEndCallTimeout.description: Seconds of silence after which the call ends automatically. A value of -1 disables this. Maximum 2 hours (7200 seconds).

textLlmModelId.description: FK to llm_models (type=text) — chat LLM selection

voiceLlmModelId.description: FK to llm_models (type=voice) — voice agent LLM selection

disableFirstMessageInterruption.description: Disable interruption of the first message

turnAfterSilence.description: The maximum number of seconds since the user last spoke. If exceeded, the agent will respond and force a turn. A value of -1 means the agent will wait indefinitely for user input.

silenceEndCallTimeout.description: Seconds of silence after which the call ends automatically. A value of -1 disables this. Maximum 2 hours (7200 seconds).

aiAutoReturnDelayMinutes.description: Minutes of silence before the AI assistant auto-returns to the chat after a manager takeover. A value of -1 disables auto-return (the AI never rejoins on its own). Maximum 24 hours (1440 minutes).

phoneNumber.description: Phone number to originate call to. Accepts +<digits>, plain digits with country code (e.g. 380...), or local format starting with 0.

callerAssistantId.description: ID of the assistant to make the call as. Must belong to the same company as the assistant on the route. If omitted, the route assistant is used.

dynamicVariables.description: Arbitrary key/value pairs forwarded to the voice assistant as `dynamic_variables`. Can be used to personalize the conversation (e.g. customer name, order ID).

disableInterruptions.description: If true, tool execution will disable interruptions

apiCallUrl.description: Required for webhook types (webhook_action, webhook_postcall), not needed for client type

httpMethod.description: HTTP method for webhook types (webhook_action, webhook_postcall), not needed for client type

executionMode.description: Execution mode: immediate - execute immediately, post_tool_speech - execute after speech, async - execute asynchronously

toolCallSound.description: Sound file to play when tool is called

disableInterruptions.description: If true, tool execution will disable interruptions

apiCallUrl.description: Required for webhook type, not needed for client type

httpMethod.description: HTTP method for webhook type, not needed for client type

executionMode.description: Execution mode: immediate - execute immediately, post_tool_speech - execute after speech, async - execute asynchronously

toolCallSound.description: Sound file to play when tool is called

description.example: Assistants dedicated to handling customer support inquiries

companyId.description: Company ID that owns the folder

assistantIds.description: Array of assistant IDs to add to the folder
Array of assistant IDs to remove from the folder

folderId.description: Target folder ID (null to remove from folder)

tools.description: Array of tools to create for the assistant

knowledges.description: Array of knowledge bases to create for the assistant

tools.description: Array of tools to create for the assistant

knowledges.description: Array of knowledge bases to create for the assistant

resourceUrl.description: Resource URL (required when type is url)

fileId.description: File ID to associate with knowledge base

vectorIds.description: Array of vector IDs for knowledge base

isSystem.description: Whether this is a system-managed knowledge base

resourceUrl.description: Resource URL (required when type is url)

elevenLabsKnowledgeId.description: ElevenLabs knowledge base ID for integration

fileId.description: File ID to associate with knowledge base

vectorIds.description: Array of vector IDs for knowledge base

isUnderAiControl.description: Target AI control state for the chat. `true` enables AI handling, `false` disables it.

aiDisableReason.description: Reason for disabling AI. Applied only when `isUnderAiControl` is `false`. Defaults to `manual` when omitted while disabling.
